coveredConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: field scope and field-boundary evidence subset
coveredConstructs.notes: Draft bridge export covers the stable field-scope subset used in same-standard rehearsal.

coveredConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: operation claim plus execution evidence subset
coveredConstructs.notes: Round-trip rehearsal remains limited to the declared operation subset rather than all OFARM operation semantics.
Only the declared equipment attachment subset is exported for reversible bridge-pack rehearsal.

droppedConstructs.notes: Internal OFARM governance lineage is retained in OFARM evidence and traces rather than emitted into ADAPT bridge payloads.

approximatedConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: advisory annotation and evidence note subset
approximatedConstructs.notes: Free-form note content is narrowed to a declared exchange subset and remains trace-backed to original OFARM evidence.

notes: Draft ADAPT bridge export for same-standard declared-subset rehearsal only; it is not a production canonical transport and does not bypass OFARM governance.
